title: Crunchy Greek Freekeh Encroute
description: A vegan, sattvic-friendly Greek dish featuring crunchy freekeh, en-croute, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, paprika, parsley, and oregano to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes until the spices are fragrant.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
In a separate pan, toast the freekeh over medium heat for about 5 minutes until lightly browned.

In a baking dish, create a thin layer of the toasted freekeh, followed by a layer of the chickpea mixture, and then a layer of the feta cheese alternative. Repeat this process 2-3 times, ending with a layer of freekeh on top.
Dust the top layer of freekeh with a pinch of salt and drizzle with olive oil.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes until the top is lightly browned.
Let the encroute cool for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
